name_en: Tan elephant print with gold buckle
name_cn:
Tan elephant print with gold buckle
niki_28cm is simply too cool, the bag shape is beautiful with no flaws, soft and delicate sheepskin creates a retro yet stylish look. Handheld or crossbody is very doable, full of presence, suitable for both men and women. Fashion meets functionality, comfortable and stylish to wear.
Extra-large capacity perfectly arranged for daily commute and travel👌

Size:28×20.5×8.5cm
